issue.title: Retry transient S3 upload failures
issue.body: Intermittent 503s from S3 during upload cause job failures. Expected: retry up to 3 times with exponential backoff. Observed: first failure kills the job. Affected: src/upload.py.

args.failed_plan:
## Summary

Add retry logic to the upload function.

## Task Graph

### P1 — Retry wrapper
**Files:** src/upload.py (modify)
**Tests:**
